summary: Fixed 4 methodology gaps from mirror-visitor ch1 test: short-story workflow, minimal cast matrix, sub-type Knox filtering, weighted scoring
content: 1. Short stories (<50k) can merge /start+/theme into single step. 2. Added 'minimal cast' mode (2-3 suspects) for psychological thriller. 3. Knox checks now filtered by sub-type relevance. 4. /check scoring weights adjusted per sub-type (psychological: character+literary weighted higher).

summary: Integrated 12 key findings from 30+ papers, 42 repos, and 15+ professional methods into v2.0
content: Major integrations: knowledge-state.md (epistemic logic + competing narratives + villain engine + dual-reader verification), advanced-if.md (Accept/Reject/Deflect + QBN + vertical drilling), character compass (Corbett), MICE nesting (Sanderson), adversarial suspense (Xie&Riedl), anti-theme architecture (Mazin). Added 12 new methodology sources.

summary: Added a general visual novel package contract with local compile doctor validate workflow and scalable node-file authoring layout
content: The system now defines a stable VN package, compiles markdown-plus-yaml projects into story.json, records node source files, and runs a deterministic doctor pass. Template stats: 8 nodes, 2 characters, 2 locations, 3 variables.

summary: Added a modular file-first 100-round interactive thriller evolution system with quality planes, band files, and a local loop runner
content: The system now defines 100 rounds across 10 band modules. The local quality framework begins with: # Interactive Thriller Quality Framework  This reference defines the capability targets for an interactive thriller that must be:  - gripping enough to pull the reader forward - rigorous enough to survive scrutiny

summary: Created storyboard decomposition module v2 with 5-layer metacognitive framework, 8-step algorithm with VERIFY gate, shot logic system (information DAG + 6 film idiom FSMs + cognitive continuity rules), and LLM execution guide with self-audit protocol
content: New module: storyboard/ (9 files, 4286 lines). Core innovation: shot sequence logic system that treats shots as information-carrying nodes in a DAG, requiring every cut to have a causal justification. Integrates Eisenstein montage, Katz staging, Hitchcock suspense, Murch priority, with neuroscience validation from Magliano(2011) event segmentation and Liao(2023) ERP scale asymmetry studies. LLM guidance based on R²(2025), DSR(2025), and Intelligent Cinematography Review(2024). 6 computable quality metrics. 8 logic error types. 6 film idiom state machines.

Bands: Shot Logic Foundation, Idiom Library Expansion, Cognitive and Perceptual Deepening, Rhythm and Temporal Sophistication, Spatial Intelligence and Mise-en-scene, LLM Execution Optimization, Genre-Specific Shot Libraries, Cross-Module Integration, Director Autopsy and Technique Extraction, Verification, Scoring, and Codification
